subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred Threshold! The letter from his honour Ali-Akbar arrived, and in its margin were written the words of that friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه جناب آقا علی اکبر رسید و در حاشیه نیز بیان آن یار
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
